word: G1133 - γυναικάριον - gynaikárion - goo-nahee-kar'-ee-on - Silly woman

sections.paragraph:
- Original: γυναικάριον

- Transliteration: Gunaikarion

- Phonetic: goo-nahee-kar'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. a little woman: used contemptuously

- Origin: a diminutive from G1135

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: A diminutive from G1135; a little (that is foolish) woman: - silly woman.
